title: “烧钱”已成刻板印象；
description: Anthropic第二季度营收预计将达到109亿美元，增长约130%，并将实现首次营业利润5.59亿美元。
titleZh: “烧钱”已成刻板印象；
titleEn: "Burning money" has become a stereotype; Anthropic expects Q2 revenue to double, achieving operating profit for the first time
descriptionZh: Anthropic第二季度营收预计将达到109亿美元，增长约130%，并将实现首次营业利润5.59亿美元。
descriptionEn: Anthropic's Q2 revenue is expected to reach $10.9 billion, an increase of approximately 130%, and it will achieve its first operating profit of $559 million. Its quarterly revenue growth rate now exceeds that of Zoom during the pandemic, as well as Google and Facebook before their respective IPOs. Analysis shows that Anthropic's inference gross margin has jumped from 38% to over 70%, with annualized revenue soaring to more than $44 billion.
